jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Algorithms
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h3><strong>About Stitch Fix, Inc. </strong></h3><p>Stitch Fix (NASDAQ: SFIX) is the leading online personal styling service that helps people discover the styles they will love that fit perfectly so they always look - and feel - their best.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Software Engineer, Algorithms partners with Data Science & Engineering to ship the recommendation algorithms that power Stitch Fix's styling pipeline.</p>

jobs.title: Principal Full-Stack Data Scientist - Recommendation Algorithms
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Stitch Fix (NASDAQ: SFIX) is the leading online personal styling service. The Data Platform team owns the longitudinal style-recommendation data model.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Principal Full-Stack Data Scientist partners with Algorithms and Data Engineering to quantify recommendation efficacy across customer cohorts.</p>
